project_type: Next.js 16 full-stack app with AI Agent (LangChain/LangGraph)
build_system: npm with Next.js build, Prisma ORM with SQLite
test_framework: Vitest with tests in tests/ directory
build_command: npx prisma generate && npx next build
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx prisma generate to regenerate client after schema changes. 2. Run npx vitest run to verify all tests pass. 3. Run npx next build to verify the build succeeds.
environment_constraints: SQLite database, single-process deployment, ADMIN_SECRET env var required for auth
key_patterns: requireAuth(request) returns null on success or 401 Response on failure. rateLimiter.isRateLimited(key) returns boolean. auditKnowledgeContent(content) returns {safe, issues[]}. Agent graph uses AgentState annotation with reducers. Tools are in src/lib/langchain/tools/. Middleware is at src/middleware.ts.
directory_structure: src/app/api/ contains all API routes. src/lib/ contains shared utilities (auth, rate-limiter, agent-guard/, langchain/). prisma/ contains schema and SQLite DB. tests/ contains Vitest test files.
